name: HITEN MITSURUGI RYU: HIKEN - KUZU RYU SEN (HITEN MITSURUGI STYLE: SECRET TECHNIQUE - NINE-HEADED DRAGON FLASH)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 5

Perform: 13 | Perform DC: 29

Components: F, Mas, Mob, P

You make nine attacks against the target, at your highest attack bonus. Only the first attack benefits from any charge bonuses, and every other attack suffers a cumulative -1 penalty to attack (-1 for the second attack, -2 for the third, etc). The attacks gain Kawarimi Defense 2, which increases by 1 each time an attack hits (up to Kawarimi Defense 9).

Each hit deals 1d8 damage of a type appropriate to the weapon used (doubled on critical hits). The ninth attack's critical threat range increases by 4, and it deals triple damage on a confirmed critical hit.

You may continue to move past your opponent once the attacks are made (if you have any movement left), without provoking any attacks of opportunity from it.

Mastery: The fourth step increases the base damage per hit to 1d10.
